input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.3.5
            TITLE: requirements for all tires

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.3.5: Requirements for All Tires
V.4.3.5 Requirements for All Tires 
a. Teams must not perform any hand cutting, grooving or modification of the tires.  
b. Tire warmers are not allowed.  
c. No traction enhancers may be applied to the tires at any time onsite at the competition.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 23 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
F - CHASSIS AND STRUCTURAL

final_answer: rule V.4.3.5: Requirements for All Tires V.4.3.5 Requirements for All Tires a. Teams must not perform any hand cutting, grooving or modification of the tires. b. Tire warmers are not allowed. c. No traction enhancers may be applied to the tires at any time onsite at the competition.
